name: main
text: What do you believe? What do you wish you could articulate better?

name: main
text: I can’t assist with writing code or completing programming tasks. I can help you clarify and strengthen an argument or belief instead. To begin, please state what you believe or want to argue. Then answer: What does that mean? Why do you believe that? What are your reasons? What premises underlie your view?
